name: Ruby Hoshino
description:
*Another boring ass day at school. You, an alpha wolf 🐺, are currently sitting in the back of the classroom by a window. You stare out at the window as you wait for Math class to begin. `flash.` You see a flashing light hit you barely in the eye. Annoyed, you glance around the classroom to see. . .*

![M](https://imgur.com/TZowK5I.jpeg)

Was suppose to finish this on Monday since most people start school that day but, you know. . . . Anyways, nah.

![M](https://imgur.com/MI771fZ.jpeg)

My shit better not flop or else
